hero.subtitle: From intimate riads to majestic desert palaces, we curate cinematic wedding experiences that blend Moroccan heritage with modern luxury.

about.p1: Founded in the heart of the Red City, Kech Weddings was born from a passion for storytelling and the timeless beauty of Morocco. We believe that every wedding is a unique masterpiece, deserving of meticulous attention and a touch of magic.
about.p2: Our team of local experts and international designers work in harmony to transform your vision into an immersive reality. We don't just plan events; we create emotional journeys that resonate for a lifetime.

promises.title: Signature Promises
promises.subtitle: We uphold the highest standards of luxury and authenticity in every event we produce.

venues.title: Exclusive Venues
venues.description: Access to Marrakech's most hidden gems, from private desert oases to historic riads.

design.title: Bespoke Design
design.description: Every detail is custom-tailored to reflect your personal style and love story.

storytelling.title: Emotional Storytelling
storytelling.description: We focus on the moments that matter, creating a cinematic flow for your celebration.

execution.title: Seamless Execution
execution.description: Our on-site coordination ensures you remain fully present in every moment.

process.subtitle: A seamless experience from the first inquiry to the final dance. We handle the complexities so you can enjoy the magic.

step1.title: Discovery Call
step1.description: We begin with an intimate conversation to understand your vision, values, and the atmosphere you wish to create.

step2.title: Concept & Venue
step2.description: Our team presents curated venue options and a bespoke design concept that aligns with your aesthetic.

step3.title: Curation
step3.description: We hand-select the finest vendors, from floral artists to cinematic photographers, ensuring a cohesive team.

step4.title: The Celebration
step4.description: Our on-site coordination team manages every detail, allowing you to be fully present in your love story.

items.text: Kech Weddings transformed our vision into a reality that exceeded our wildest dreams. The attention to detail and the local expertise they provided made our Marrakech wedding truly unforgettable.
items.author: Elena & Marc

items.text: Planning a destination wedding can be stressful, but the team made it feel effortless. They found us the most incredible hidden riad that our guests are still talking about months later.
items.author: Sophia & David

items.text: The most cinematic experience of our lives. From the desert sunset ceremony to the fire dancers at night, every moment was perfectly choreographed and deeply emotional.
items.author: Isabella & Julian

cta.subtitle: Limited availability for 2026 & 2027. Contact us today to begin curating your bespoke celebration in Marrakech.

footer.description: The premier luxury wedding planning agency in Marrakech. We specialize in creating bespoke, cinematic celebrations that honor tradition while embracing modern elegance.

wedding_types.title: Wedding Experiences
wedding_types.subtitle: Discover the diverse settings we offer for your extraordinary celebration in Morocco.

desert_agafay.title: Desert Wedding in Agafay
desert_agafay.description: An ethereal celebration under the vast Moroccan sky. The Agafay desert provides a lunar landscape that transforms into a golden paradise at sunset.
desert_agafay.experience: A raw, powerful connection with nature elevated by five-star hospitality.

riad.title: Riad Wedding
riad.description: Intimate and historic, a Riad wedding captures the soul of the Medina. Hidden courtyards, intricate tilework, and the scent of orange blossoms.
riad.experience: An intimate sanctuary of peace and beauty in the heart of the bustling city.

garden.title: Garden Wedding
garden.description: Lush greenery and blooming roses in Marrakech's most prestigious gardens. A romantic setting that feels like a living fairytale.
garden.experience: A timeless, romantic atmosphere surrounded by nature's finest work.

villas.title: Private Villas & Estates
villas.description: A private residence feel with elevated hospitality — space for multi-day hosting, poolside gatherings, and relaxed luxury.
villas.experience: The ultimate in privacy and personalization for your closest circle.

camps.title: Desert Camps
camps.description: Immersive desert living with all the comforts of a luxury hotel. Perfect for adventurous couples seeking an authentic yet refined experience.
camps.experience: A journey into the heart of Moroccan tradition and nomadic spirit.

beach.title: Beachfront Venues
beach.description: Where the Atlantic breeze meets Moroccan charm. Our coastal venues offer a refreshing alternative with stunning sunset views.
beach.experience: A breezy, sophisticated celebration by the rhythmic waves of the ocean.

gallery.title: Our Gallery
gallery.subtitle: A glimpse into the cinematic celebrations we've curated across the most breathtaking landscapes of Morocco.

contact.subtitle: Whether you have a clear vision or need inspiration, we are here to guide you through every step of the journey.
